name: NASA Deep Space Network
coverageDescription: Near-continuous deep-space coverage via three complexes spaced ~120° in longitude (Goldstone, Canberra, Madrid)
notes: Operated by JPL; supports all NASA interplanetary and selected partner missions

name: Kongsberg Satellite Services
coverageDescription: Global ground-station network with polar, equatorial, and mid-latitude sites; strong Arctic/Antarctic presence
notes: Major commercial provider; Svalbard and TrollSat sites enable every-orbit polar contact

name: ESA ESTRACK Network
coverageDescription: European and worldwide stations supporting ESA LEO, MEO, GEO, and deep-space missions
notes: Core stations at Kiruna, Kourou, Cebreros, New Norcia, and Malargüe
